title: cylicodaphne garciae
intro: Cylicodaphne garciae, also known as the Garcia's cylicodaphne or Philippine cylicodaphne, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cylicodaphne garciae include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the leaves and branches of Cylicodaphne garciae are typically used to make teas or infusions, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
